item.title: 1137088d-ca1f-4799-b59d-7ddac07c448a
item.description: Фарш назад не провернуть It is much easier to start from scratch rather than calculate proper rollback path. The concept is applied for many different thing so that has become a rule of thumb: iterators - throw exceptions if tried to reuse streams - throw exceptions if tried to reuse immutable objects … Question What interfaces enable syntax sugar in Java? … Question What is something related to hashcode / equals and posmotre.ch/Мы_с_Тамарой_ходим_парой Question Imagine myself being at interview when Dmitry G___ asked me about something related to hashcode and equality? .

item.title: e981a07e-ab1b-437b-aaaf-75ab98c6c6d4
item.description: English verbs Everything is this world is either is or has and we can apply actions on top of that. English auxiliary verbs are not by chance auxiliary - they reflect our life.
